scripts.clean:reports: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = 'cypress/reports'; fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync(path + '/mochareports', { recursive: true });"
scripts.combine-reports: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('cypress/reports/mochareports', { recursive: true });" && npx mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/mocha/*.json -o cypress/reports/mochareports/report.json
scripts.posttest: npm run combine-reports && npm run generate-report
